Bhrigu Samhita and The Curse of Bhrigu
I am, Terecita Pierluissi, born 5:32 AM on 7 April 1972 in the Albert Einstein Medical Center of
the Bronx, New York. My parents, were working-class poor at the time of my young life, they are
now deceased. They were from the Isla del Encanto (Enchanted Island) and were born as native M
“Puerto Ricans”. At the age of 18, I gained a full scholarship to the Ivy League and attended Cornell
